definition: The second jhāna in the standard fourfold sequence of ariya sammā samādhi.
notes: Use this record for the second member of ariya sammā samādhi. The repository keeps mental theme here as well so the sequence stays coordinated and does not slide into state-language. This member should stay linked to the dropping of thinking and pondering, inner clarity, and unification of mind.

example_phrases.notes: Second member of the standard fourfold sequence.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the second member of the fourfold path expression of ariya sammā samādhi.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not recast as second absorption or second trance. Use second jhāna only where a controlled technical reason calls for the Pali.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the second member from drifting away from practical path handling and its linked formula expressions.
